obsbase.resultset
=================

.. py:module:: obsbase.resultset


Classes
-------

.. autoapisummary::

   obsbase.resultset.ResultSet


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:class:: ResultSet(view, rows)

   Collection of notes returned by a view.

   ResultSet behaves like a sequence of Note objects and provides
   convenience methods for exporting the results.


   .. py:attribute:: view


   .. py:attribute:: rows


   .. py:method:: __iter__() -> collections.abc.Iterator


   .. py:method:: __len__()


   .. py:method:: __getitem__(index)


   .. py:method:: to_dataframe()
